leadText: Embody Aspect (Japanese: おもかげやどし Bearing Visage) is an Ability introduced during Generation IX, in The Teal Mask. It is the signature Ability of Terastallized Ogerpon, and has a different effect depending on Ogerpon's form.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] This Ability effect may be in need of research. Reason: Check for other moves/Abilities that can or cannot copy/replace/suppress this Ability. Usual suspects: Simple Beam , Role Play , Entrainment , Trace , Receiver / Power of Alchemy , Lingering Aroma / Mummy . You can discuss this on the talk page. Upon Terastallizing , Ogerpon's Ability will change to Embody Aspect, and one of its stats is raised by one stage, depending on the mask: Teal Mask : Speed Wellspring Mask : Sp. Def Hearthflame Mask : Attack Cornerstone Mask : Defense Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Embody Aspect has no effect outside of battle.
